tonedesc.deep: Boosts low frequencies for a heavy, resonant sound.
tonedesc.muffled: Reduces high frequencies for a softer, ear-friendly tone.
tonedesc.clear: Removes low muddiness to create a crisp and clear sound.
tonedesc.natural: Disables processing to play the original, natural sound.

sounds.hintPlay: To hear the ambient sounds selected here, you must press the Play button on the Player screen.
sounds.hintAtmosOnly: To listen to ambient sounds only, select the 'Atmos only' Preset on the Player tab, or set all noise volumes to zero in the Mixer.

footstep-strong.name: Heavy Shield
footstep-strong.desc: Strong low-freq masking for heavy footsteps.

conversation-mask.name: Vocal Mask
conversation-mask.desc: Mid-range boost to cover voices nearby.

relax-sleep.name: Deep Sleep
relax-sleep.desc: Calm brown noise for restful sleep.

focus-work.name: Deep Focus
focus-work.desc: Flat pink noise to block distractions.

atmos-only.name: Atmos only
atmos-only.desc: A mode for playing only ambient sounds (Atmos) without any noise.

slide1.title: Envelope Noise with Sound
slide1.description: Your brain is sensitive to sudden sounds in silence. By playing a broad range of frequencies (noise), unpleasant sounds like footsteps or voices blend into the background, making it harder for your brain to react.

slide2.title: Design Your Perfect Space
slide2.description: Freely blend multiple noises with ambient sounds like rain or a campfire. Save your favorite combinations as 'Scenes' and recall them with a single tap.

slide3.title: Keep Quiet All Day
slide3.description: To continue playing even when the screen is off, we recommend Android users set 'Battery Optimization' to 'Unrestricted' to prevent the OS from stopping the app.
